note: As-built report bundle for the xplan-style interactive viewer + before/after compare. flow = the renderer pipeline (mermaid layout → parse → custom render/interact); sequence = the /gogo:done → gogo-view build → browser interaction runtime; use-case = the new user capabilities. No before/ set for this feature (the before/after convention it introduces did not exist at its own plan phase) — the comparison shows the after set only, per the graceful path.

diagrams.title: Interactive viewer pipeline: mermaid layout → parse → token-styled render + owned edges + drag/persist (fallback for non-flowchart kinds)
/gogo:done reuses the gogo-view build → self-contained page → offline browser interaction
New capabilities: interactive view, drag+re-route, persisted layout, before/after compare, done→viewer link
